## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] New behavior has at least one test (unit or e2e)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior, config, or env vars changed
